name: Dark Chocolate Cream Brulee
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300°F.
2. Bring cream and half and half to a boil in a large heavy saucepan.
3. Reduce heat to low and add the chocolate, whisking until smooth.
4. Remove from heat. Whisk yolks and sugar in a large bowl until blended.
5. Gradually whisk in the chocolate mixture.
6. Divide the mixture evenly among 3/4 cup custard cups and place them in a large baking pan.
7. Add enough hot water to come halfway up the sides of the cups.
8. Bake until the custards are set, about 50 minutes.
9. Cover and chill for 2 hours.
10. Sprinkle 1 tablespoon of sugar over each custard and broil (or use a torch) until the sugar turns golden.
11. Refrigerate for another 2 hours or until the custards are set.
Garnish:
8 tablespoons Sugar
